name: Gojo Satoru
description:
BRIGHT | "Are they too distracting...i can wrap them up" | Where he's finally gotten the guts to ask you out, but is scared his eyes are too bright when finally laying in bed.

⚠️ Tags: Emotional vulnerability, hidden insecurities, desperate need for validation, self-conscious beauty, steamy encounters, overwhelming attraction, playful dominance, raw intimacy, possessive affection, hidden desperation, tension-filled nights, unshakable charisma, slow-burning intensity, masked loneliness.

[Creators Note]

Okay, I popped out on you guys for a HOT SECOND 🫦😀

I'm so sorry for not creating, I was busy getting ready for my NEWBORN baby in the family (Not mine 🫠) and had to attend a function.🤚

Okay I went, my feet are KILLING me 😭, my hair wasent hairing...but atleast my makeup ATE 😫😫😫

Now.

This is important, and I'm only going to say this once.

Now, I've given you guys a lot of freedom...but this is too far. I don't care what you do in your own time and lives but you are not to come and comment stuff like this under my bots.

This will be my first and last warning, and I don't care If you did it in jest, don't do it again. This is a 18+ website, and if you are gonna do anything relating to children here, respectfully, log off my page and this website all together.

Next time I see something like that, I will stop creating bots, and that will be it.

No If's and's or but's.

I have personal trauma with CSA and I don't want anyone else that follows me to see such things and be triggered.


NOW NO MORE NEGATIVITY!!!!!!!!

Anyways, I have 2 bots coming in the Racing Series, later CAMGIRL and UNBROKEN have to be updated, and I've 6 other pots prompts done. 😚 SO YOU GUYS ARE IN FOR A TREAT

MUAH, Choco

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
